title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 178.790 - Boundaries of community college districts
text:
178.790.  Boundaries of community college districts. — The boundaries of any community college district organized pursuant to sections 178.770 to 178.890 shall coincide with the boundaries of the school district or of the contiguous school districts proposed to be included, and the community college district shall be in addition to any other school districts existing in any portion of the area.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 13-79, A.L. 1998 S.B. 553) 
(Source: L. 1961 p. 357 § 3)
